title: Oldcraft
description: A very basic modpack featuring "Nostalgic Tweaks", "Modern Beta", and "From the Fog" to give off that Oldschool Minecraft feel.
body:
[Latest Version : OLDCRAFT V1.0]

Oldcraft is a pretty barebones modpack that brings back the nostalgic feel of Mincraft featuring 3 major mods:

From the Fog, by LunarEclipseStudios / / Brings in a working version of Herobrine that can stalk you, place signs, and much more https://modrinth.com/datapack/from-the-fog

Nostalgic Tweaks, by Adrenix / / Brings back old Minecraft beta and alpha features in a very configurable way https://modrinth.com/mod/nostalgic-tweaks

Modern Beta, by b3spectacled / / Lets you play on beta, alpha, and even indev world generations of minecraft. *Includes farlands* https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/modern-beta/files/4496219

This mod also features very many optimization mods to make sure Minecraft runs at top performance, including but not limited to:

Iris Shaders, Fastload, Dashloader, FerriteCore, Memory Leak Fix, Sodium, &more

Recommend use the "Golden Days" resourcepack created by PoeticRainbow found at  https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/golden-days if you would like old Minecraft textures and sounds

I have gotten pretty much everything out of this modpack that I wanted, oldschool playstyle and world gen with an actual Herobrine to haunt you. I don't plan on updating this pack further, feel free to download, modify, and redistribute as long as you do so within the original mod developers individual licenses and wishes. 

Enjoy!
